summary: Tested 'Ventas por Categoría' report end-to-end: backend endpoints (JSON + PDF + XLSX) all return 200 with correct content-types and magic bytes. UI renders pie chart, hierarchical table with TOTAL GENERAL row matching sum of categories (RD$25,100 = 15,100 + 10,000; 76 = 56 + 20 qty). Expand/collapse + export buttons all present with correct data-testids. 7/7 pytest backend tests passed.

ui_bugs.issue: Component is rendered TWICE on the page — every data-testid (by-category-report, by-category-table, grand-total-row, expand-all-btn, collapse-all-btn, download-pdf-btn, download-xlsx-btn) resolves to 2 elements. This breaks Playwright strict mode and likely causes duplicate axios GET /api/reports/sales-by-category requests. Check Reports.js lines 617-770 for duplicate render of the report panel.

Report list items (p.font-medium inside button.w-full.text-left) are reported 'not visible' by Playwright despite being visually present — suggests an invisible overlay/ancestor with visibility:hidden or pointer-events blocking. Workaround: direct JS .click() works. Impact: real users still click fine, but automated testing requires force=true. Also NONE of the report list cards have data-testid attributes (e.g., no data-testid='report-item-by-category').

action_items: Fix duplicate rendering of ByCategoryReport in Reports.js (lines ~617-770). Every testid in the rendered subtree appears 2x.
Add data-testid='report-item-by-category' (and for each report id) to sidebar report list buttons to make them selectable without text matching.

Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md: Admin PIN in this seeded DB is 11338585, not 1000. The handoff note is wrong — PIN 1000 returns 401 'PIN incorrecto'. (Active admin user 'Admin' has sha256 hash matching '11338585'.)
Investigate why report list cards are reported 'not visible' by Playwright (likely an invisible overlay/wrapper).
critical_code_review_comments: ByCategoryReport returns multiple <tr> siblings inside a React Fragment (<>..</>) without a key on the Fragment — will generate React console warnings. Use <React.Fragment key={`cat-${i}`}>..</React.Fragment>.
Report list items in Reports.js lack data-testid — violates internal testability rule (all interactive elements must have data-testid).

Reports.js duplicate render: same report component rendered twice (possibly because both a mobile layout and desktop layout render without proper hidden/visible classes, or two branches of a ternary both render).
test_credentials: Admin PIN: 11338585 (NOT 1000 as handoff claimed). OSCAR cashier: 1111.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing jornada data (2 categories: CERVEZAS 15,100 / HAMBURGUESA 10,000).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints fully validated and green. Main UI bug is duplicate render of ByCategoryReport component in Reports.js — check for double mount (maybe a responsive wrapper that renders both desktop and mobile versions). Use PIN 11338585 for admin login. Sidebar report items need force=true or JS .click() to trigger selection. Date range 'Este Mes' has data; default date range may be empty on fresh jornada.
rca of the issue: Duplicate component render RCA: Likely Reports.js renders ByCategoryReport inside two branches (e.g., one for mobile hidden via CSS 'hidden md:block' and another for desktop) but both branches are kept in DOM simultaneously. Since data-testids duplicate, the child component is instantiated twice. Fix: use CSS visibility classes only with a single render, or conditionally render based on a resize hook.
